Bash(/tmp/large_files.py << 'EOF'
"""Identify what large files do."""
from pathlib import Path

base = Path\("packages/core/src/db_mcp"\)
large_files = [
    \("benchmark/runner.py", 1865\),
    \("tools/generation.py", 1595\),
    \("services/connection.py", 1372\),
    \("code_runtime/backend.py", 1354\),
    \("bicp/traces.py", 1229\),
    \("api/router.py", 1107\),
    \("tools/daemon_tasks.py", 1003\),
    \("services/vault.py", 983\),
    \("services/query.py", 950\),
]

for fpath, lines in large_files:
    full_path = base / fpath
    with open\(full_path\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    
    # Count functions
    import ast
    tree = ast.parse\(content\)
    funcs = [n for n in ast.walk\(tree\) if isinstance\(n, \(ast.FunctionDef, ast.AsyncFunctionDef\)\)]
    
    # Get docstring
    docstring = ast.get_docstring\(tree\) or ""
    if docstring:
        docstring = docstring.split\("\\n"\)[0]
    
    print\(f"{fpath:40} {lines:5} lines  {len\(funcs\):3} funcs  - {docstring}"\)
EOF)
